news.t: First Trust Advisors L.P. Announces Distribution for First Trust Income Opportunities ETF
First Trust Announces Name Change for First Trust CEF Income Opportunity ETF

overview.description: The First Trust Income Opportunities ETF (FCEF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund is an actively managed ETF that holds closed-end funds to get exposure to US and non-US equity, fixed income securities, and commodities. The fund's primary objective is to provide current income. FCEF was launched on Sep 27, 2016 and is issued by First Trust.
